The 4 editions

One platform. You choose how much horsepower you need.

Same core, same flow, same data. Changing edition is moving a slider — not migrating to another system.

One platform for all 4 editions — change edition without migrating systems.

Get started

Lite Edition

The basics done right. Customers, products and services organized; quotes that look professional; invoices that meet basic DGI rules. No bloated features you will never use.

Ideal for: Small business taking its first steps into digital — an independent practice, a small distributor, a freelancer with a steady client list.

$24 /mo

or $240 a year (16% off)

Branches
1
Users
3
Records
500
Storage
2 GB
Get a quote for Lite Edition

Modules included

Customers
Basic CRUD, search, filters
Services
Catalog of billable services
Inventory
Products with manual stock
Quotes
Up to 50 quotes/month
Invoices
Up to 100 invoices/month (no e-invoicing)
Reports
6 pre-built reports with filters
Email support Automatic updates Daily backup
The essentials

Core Edition

The edition that turns on DGI electronic invoicing with any of the 4 certified PACs (Digifact, HKA, Factura Fácil, eFacturapty). Accounts receivable with multi-invoice receipts. Saved SQL reports for analytics. A second branch included.

Ideal for: Established SME with 5-10 employees and 1 or 2 branches — the restaurant with two locations, the clinic with a main practice and a satellite, the regional distributor.

$36 /mo

or $360 a year (16% off)

Branches
2
Users
8
Records
5000
Storage
10 GB
Get a quote for Core Edition

Modules included

DGI electronic invoicing
32 DGI rules verified, 0 production rejections
AR with multi-invoice receipts
One payment applied across several invoices
Quotes with conversion
Accepted quote → invoice in 1 click
Inventory movements
In, out, adjustments with audit trail
Level 2 reports (SQL)
Admin writes saved SELECTs with whitelist
Editable PDF templates
Customize invoice, quote and receipt
Email + WhatsApp support Installable PWA Guided setup
Most popular

Pro Edition

The leap to professional. Real multi-branch with consolidation, scheduled automations (collection reminders, follow-ups), REST API to integrate with your accounting or e-commerce, WhatsApp Business to talk to customers from inside the system. Optional white-label.

Ideal for: Mid-size SME with 15-30 employees and 3-5 branches — the workshop chain, the restaurant with 4 locations, the distributor with central warehouse + stores, the medical group with several practices.

$96 /mo

or $960 a year (16% off)

Branches
5
Users
20
Records
50000
Storage
50 GB
Get a quote for Pro Edition

Modules included

Multi-branch
Inventory, sales and reports per branch or consolidated
Automations
Collection reminders, follow-ups, stock alerts
REST API
100,000 calls/month with OpenAPI 3.0
WhatsApp Business
Meta-approved templates + automatic dispatch
Inter-branch transfers
Atomic double movement, audited
Level 3 reports (PDF)
Dynamic templates with editable placeholders
Priority support Assisted onboarding (4h) Initial training
No limits

Enterprise Edition

When your operation needs more than any standard "plan" offers. Full white-label (sell SuiteHub under your brand), unlimited API, 24/7 SLA, dedicated onboarding, support for custom integrations. AI-powered reports surface patterns your human reports never see.

Ideal for: Large enterprise or chain with unlimited branches, 30+ users, integration with legacy systems and advanced audit requirements.

$192 /mo

or $1920 a year (16% off)

Branches
Unlimited
Users
50
Records
Unlimited
Storage
200 GB
Get a quote for Enterprise Edition

Modules included

AI-powered reports
Forecasting, anomalies, automatic insights
Full white-label
Sell SuiteHub under your brand, domain and branding
Unlimited API
No call cap, bidirectional webhooks
24/7 support
SLA with contractual response time
Dedicated onboarding
Assigned SuiteHub consultant, migration plan
Custom integrations
Connection with the company’s legacy systems
Contractual SLA Dedicated account manager Geographic backup (Tier 3)
